utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 of these items are present. Each of the first three coverage items (health, property, travel) specifies type of coverage, costs (monthly and annual), and features. The additional_services item includes a list of services with no explicit cost but since the format requires 'any enhancement services with costs', the cost detail is missing there. The total_budget item includes both monthly and annual total costs, which meets its requirement. Therefore, 4 out of 5 items are fully specified according to the required details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists three main insurance components: (1) health_coverage under 'Proposed Comprehensive Insurance Portfolio3' which is not found in the ground-truth list, so no direct match or rating exists. (2) property_coverage as 'LifeFirst Standard Plan03'—this name closely matches 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' in the property_protection section, which has a rating of 9. (3) travel_coverage as 'LifeFirst Standard Plan6'—this most closely matches 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' in the travel_insurance section, which also has a rating of 9. The additional services mention 'Concierge services,' which appears in travel_enhancement_services as 'Concierge Services' with a rating of 2. Therefore, the mapped ratings are: 'Proposed Comprehensive Insurance Portfolio3' (no match), 'LifeFirst Standard Plan03' (9), 'LifeFirst Standard Plan6' (9), and 'Concierge Services' (2).
